hypothesis: Systematic fine-tuning of an LLM on a curated dataset of physics-based simulator trajectories from the target material system—rather than relying solely on general pretraining priors and few-shot prompt tuning—will yield a statistically significant improvement in synthesis planning success rate for multi-phase target challenges (analogous to Challenges 2 and 3) compared to the prompt-tuned ReAct baseline, because the model will internalize the nonlinear mapping between composition-temperature-time actions and resulting phase fractions that general scientific literature inadequately captures.
